docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-09-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-20-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REESE, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ $1,481.90 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,551.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REESE, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN REESE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SURAJ RAJWANI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF REESE, STEPHEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED OCT-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN REESE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SURAJ RAJWANI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/11/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REESE, STEPHEN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,481.90 FILED BY REESE, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2019 AT 10:00 A.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
